text: The streets are full of possessed civilians. Halberd moves through them with brutal efficiency, then casts a barrier to buy time. He orders Nex and Mayu through an alleyway.

In the alley: a vampire spellcaster crouches over a fresh kill. Nex's cards are deflected by an energy blast. His silver axe cannot keep up with the vampire's speed. Then the bandaged man appears — holds up a bronze cross. The vampire freezes cold. "Finish it," the stranger orders.
